Progress Report On The Status Of The Purchase Of The Single-Premium Deferred Annuity And The Establishment Of The Special Needs Trust.
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Off Calendar

Unopposed Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Petition To Approve Minors Compromise
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action For A Minor ***** Redacted *****
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of the Minor, Jazzlin Mejia, and for hearing on the Unopposed Motion To Seal the Record pertaining to the Petition to Approve Minor's Compromise.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR 176. Telephone: 406-381-1645.

Joseph Nicholson, Esq. appeared with petitioner Nannette Andrade, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Jazzlin Mejia, who was also present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified. The minor was placed under oath but did not testify.
Also present was Gustavo Mejia, the minor's father, and Settlement Planner Tanis Kelly, Esq., both of whom were placed under oath but did not testify.
Steven E. Swaney, Esq. appeared for defendants Newell Brands, Inc. (formerly know as Newell Rubbermaid, Inc.) and GRACO Children's Products, Inc.
Order appointing Ms. Andrade as Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed on August 4, 2015.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $4,246,333.33.
Attorney Fees - $975,503.19.
Medical Bills - $102,259,46.
Medical Liens - $186,201.92.
Costs - $346,212.58.

The net balance of $2,638,129.18 shall be disbursed as follows:

(A) $2,550,701.00 shall be invested in a single-premium deferred annuity, subject to withdrawal only upon the authorization of the Court. The terms and conditions of the annuity are set forth in the Order Approving the Compromise in Attachment 7c(2)(b); and

(B) The remaining $87,428.18 shall be deposited into a special needs trust under Probate Code Section 3600, et seq., for the benefit of Jazzlin N. Mejia.

Unredacted and Redacted versions of the Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of the Minor were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to July 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the purchase of the single-premium deferred annuity and the establishment of the special needs trust.

Lastly, the Court GRANTS the Unopposed Motion To Seal the Record pertaining to the Petition to Approve Minor's Compromise and to Seal the Trancript of this morning's proceedings.

Order Granting the Unopposed Motion to Seal Portions of the Petition to Approve the Minor's Compromise was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
